zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-408 and Sec. 21-412 (Property Development Standards for Permitted Principal Uses), Table SR-43/SR-35
zones.notes: Source migrated off Municode; Peoria AZ code is hosted on American Legal Publishing (codelibrary.amlegal.com/codes/peoriaaz), supplement 2026 S-9. Reached via Chrome browser (server-side fetch/API blocked by 403). Min lot area 43,560 sf = 1.0 acre (table labels 'square feet'). No density/FAR/story standard published for SR districts. Side setback 20 ft each side.

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-408 and Sec. 21-412, Table SR-43/SR-35
zones.notes: Side Yard Setback recorded in table as '10/20' = 10 ft minimum on one side, 20 ft combined; binding single-side minimum recorded as 10. No density/FAR/story standard published.

permitted: One detached single-family dwelling per lot

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-415 and Sec. 21-420 (Property Development Standards for Permitted Principal Uses), R1 table
zones.notes: Min lot area listed in table (header says 'acreage' but values are square feet; 43,560 sf = 1.0 acre). Min lot depth 100 ft. Front setback 35 ft for front-facing garage (and side-entry garage). Interior side setback shown as 'min/total' = 10/30; binding single-side minimum 10, 30 ft combined. No max density or FAR published; height 30 ft, no story cap stated.

permitted: One detached single-family dwelling per lot

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-415 and Sec. 21-420, R1 table
zones.notes: Min lot depth 100 ft. Front setback 30 ft (front-facing garage). Interior side 'min/total' = 10/20; binding single-side minimum 10, 20 ft combined. No max density/FAR published.

permitted: One detached single-family dwelling per lot

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-415 and Sec. 21-420, R1 table
zones.notes: Min lot depth 100 ft. Front setback 20 ft. Interior side 'min/total' = 5/15; binding single-side minimum 5, 15 ft combined. No max density/FAR published.

permitted: One detached single-family dwelling per lot

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-415 and Sec. 21-420, R1 table
zones.notes: Min lot depth 100 ft. Front setback 20 ft for front-facing garage; 10 ft allowed for side-entry garage (note that not more than 60% of front-facing elevation may be at the 10-ft setback). Interior side 'min/total' = 5/15; binding single-side minimum 5. No max density/FAR published.

permitted: One detached single-family dwelling per lot

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-415 and Sec. 21-420, R1 table
zones.notes: Min lot depth 100 ft. Front setback 20 ft (front-facing garage); 10 ft for side-entry garage. Interior side 'min/total' = 5/15; binding single-side minimum 5. No max density/FAR published.

permitted: One detached single-family dwelling per lot

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-415 and Sec. 21-420, R1 table
zones.notes: Min lot depth 100 ft. Front setback 20 ft (front-facing garage); 10 ft for side-entry garage. Interior side 'min/total' = 5/15; binding single-side minimum 5. No max density/FAR published.

permitted: One detached single-family dwelling per lot

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-415 and Sec. 21-420, R1 table (note Delta)
zones.notes: LEGACY DISTRICT: per table note, R1-7 applies only to property zoned R1-7 on or before 2-13-1991; no property may be rezoned to R1-7 after that date. Still a base district in the ordinance. Min lot depth 100 ft. Interior side 'min/total' = 5/15; binding single-side minimum 5. No max density/FAR published.

permitted: One detached single-family dwelling per lot

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-415 and Sec. 21-420, R1 table
zones.notes: Min lot depth 100 ft. Front setback 20 ft (front-facing garage); 10 ft for side-entry garage. Interior side recorded in table as '5/8/13'; binding single-side minimum 5 ft (8/13 are additional combined-side figures). No max density/FAR published.

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-424 and Sec. 21-429 (Development Standards) table
zones.notes: RM-1 standards vary by building type (three columns): Attached single-family / Two-three-four-family & multi-family / Multi-family 5+. Values recorded are the most permissive envelope across building types where they form the district maximum: max density up to 18 du/ac (5+ multi-family; 8 for attached SF, 12 for 2-4 family, each potentially +2 with findings), max lot coverage up to 60% (attached SF; 50% other types), max height up to 48 ft (multi-family 5+; 30 ft other types). Binding minimum setbacks recorded: front 10 ft (attached SF; 20 ft other types), rear 15 ft (all), side 5 ft (attached SF; 20 ft other types), corner side 10-15 ft. Min lot width 30 ft applies to attached SF only (N/R for other types). No minimum lot area stated in table (TBD). No FAR/story cap published.

permitted: Mobile home subdivision lots (single-family mobile/manufactured homes)

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-431 and Sec. 21-435 (Property Development Standards for Mobile Home Subdivisions)
zones.notes: Standards are narrative (not a grid). Min lot size 7,000 sf; min lot width 60 ft; front setback from interior streets 20 ft; rear yard 30 ft; side yard 4 ft minimum single side, 13 ft total both sides (binding single-side minimum recorded as 4). Additional 25 ft setback for any building/mobile home from district boundary or street abutting the subdivision. No max height, coverage, density, or FAR specified in this section.

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-438 and Sec. 21-443 (Development Standards)
zones.notes: Standards are narrative. Minimum district area 10 acres (435,600 sf) undivided by a public street (recorded as min_lot_size_sf). Minimum area per RV site 1,750 sf; RV site min width 35 ft, min depth 50 ft. Setback for RV park 15 ft from any public street (recorded as front_setback). Max building height 2 stories or 25 ft, whichever is less. 10% of area (less private streets) devoted to recreation/open space. No district-wide side/rear building setback, lot width, density, or FAR published; per-site dimensions noted here instead.

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-502(A) and Sec. 21-506 Property Development Standards (commercial table)
zones.notes: From Sec. 21-506 commercial development-standards table. Min lot/site area, lot/site depth, and max lot coverage are 'N/R' (no requirement) in the table -> recorded TBD (no published numeric standard). Min lot width 50 ft; front and corner setback 15 ft; rear 20 ft; setback from residential zones 30 ft. No interior rear/side setback specified (N/R). Use lists summarized from district intent statement; detailed permitted/conditional uses are in the Sec. 21-503 Land Use Matrix (not enumerated here). No density/FAR/story standard published.

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-502(B) and Sec. 21-506 (commercial table)
zones.notes: Min lot width N/R; min lot/site depth 120 ft (table); max lot coverage N/R -> TBD. Max height 30 ft; front/corner 15 ft; rear 20 ft; setback from residential zones 30 ft. Permitted/conditional uses per Sec. 21-503 Land Use Matrix. No density/FAR/story standard published.

permitted: Small-scale planned retail and service uses

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-502(C) and Sec. 21-506 (commercial table)
zones.notes: Min lot/site area 3 acres (130,680 sf). Min lot/site depth 250 ft; min frontage on one arterial 450 ft. Max lot coverage 30%; max height 30 ft; front/corner 60 ft; rear 20 ft; interior rear/side setback 60 ft (recorded as side_setback); setback from residential zones 30 ft. Permitted/conditional uses per Sec. 21-503 Land Use Matrix. No density/FAR published.

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-502(D) and Sec. 21-506 (commercial table)
zones.notes: Min lot/site area 20 acres (871,200 sf). Min lot/site depth 660 ft; min frontage on one arterial 660 ft. Max lot coverage N/R -> TBD; max height 60 ft; front/corner 120 ft; rear 60 ft; interior rear/side 60 ft (recorded as side_setback); setback from residential zones 120 ft. Permitted/conditional uses per Sec. 21-503 Land Use Matrix. No density/FAR published.

permitted: Shopping center / convenience retail and service uses

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-502(E) and Sec. 21-506 (commercial table)
zones.notes: Min lot area/width/depth N/R; max lot coverage N/R -> TBD. Max height 48 ft (table note 'a'). Front/corner 15 ft; rear 20 ft; setback from residential zones 30 ft. Permitted/conditional uses per Sec. 21-503 Land Use Matrix. No density/FAR published.

zones.source_citation: Ch. 21 Zoning, Sec. 21-502(F) and Sec. 21-506 (commercial table)
zones.notes: Max lot coverage 100%; max height 48 ft. Front, corner, rear, and interior setbacks all 'N/R' (no requirement) in the table -> recorded TBD (zero/no minimum setback required). Setback from residential zones N/R. Min lot area/width/depth N/R. Permitted/conditional uses per Sec. 21-503 Land Use Matrix. No density/FAR published.

permitted: Wide range of retail, office, and service uses

zones.notes: Min lot area/width/depth N/R; max lot coverage N/R -> TBD. Max height 48 ft (table note 'a'). Front/corner 15 ft; rear 20 ft; setback from residential zones 30 ft. Permitted/conditional uses per Sec. 21-503 Land Use Matrix. No density/FAR published.

Front setback 30 ft; least single side 20 ft (recorded as side_setback), total sides 40 ft; rear 25 ft; corner side 20 ft; setback from residential zoning districts 30 ft. Permitted/conditional uses per Sec. 21-503 Land Use Matrix. No density/FAR published.
